name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agentic video-editing feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Proposed feature**
What you want to happen. Note: features must stay FREE / open-source
(no paid API, no mandatory GPU — optional GPU paths allowed).

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots.
